description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Validate JavaScript that runs on pull requests, pushes to main and release-* branches, and workflow dispatches. The workflow has six jobs: benchmark, build, test, lint, typecheck, and pack. Each job runs on ubuntu-latest or windows-latest, checks out the code, sets up JavaScript, and restores emsdk. The jobs then run yarn commands for benchmarking, building, testing, linting, typechecking, and packing.
